problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 75,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
